Why Nically Hair ? Nically Hair is more than just a brand.

It’s a tribute to the two people who shaped me the most. The name comes from my parents, Nick and Sally, who have both passed on but remain my biggest inspiration. They were, and always would have been, my biggest cheerleaders. This brand is my way of honoring their love, support, and belief in me.

Every detail of Nically Hair is deeply personal, including the names of each color, which are inspired by my family: mostly my kids, nieces, and nephews. Family is at the heart of everything I do, and this brand is a reflection of that love and connection.
Just like the meaning behind its name, Nically Hair is built with intention to provide high-quality, natural-looking extensions that empower both clients and stylists.
It’s about more than hair; it’s about confidence, authenticity, and creating something truly special.
Welcome to Nically Hair – The Future of Hair Extensions
Born From Experience, Designed for You
Hair is more than just strands— it’s confidence, beauty, and identity.

As a stylist and someone who wears extensions myself, I’ve experienced firsthand the challenges that come with traditional hand-tied hair extensions. The bulkiness, the shedding, the unnatural seams, and the wasted hair that clients were unknowingly paying for—it didn’t sit right with me. That’s why we created the Active Genius Weft—because it’s simply genius. I knew there had to be a better way. I wanted extensions that felt as natural as they looked, that blended effortlessly, that wouldn’t shed or fall apart with an active lifestyle. Most importantly, I wanted every weft to be intentional—without extra “mustache” hair adding unnecessary weight and cost. With Nically Hair, you’re not just getting another brand of extensions—you’re getting a solution to all the common frustrations with traditional hand-tied hair. Whether you’re a client looking for the most natural-looking, long-lasting hair or a stylist searching for the best product to create flawless transformations, Nically Hair’s Active Genius Weft delivers.
Our Active Genius Wefts are designed to hold up, staying full and beautiful even with daily wear.
No extra bulk, no mustache hair
You pay for the hair you actually use, not short, unnecessary strands that add weight but no value.
Unlike other hybrid/genius wefts with plastic-looking seams, Nically Hair offers custom-ordered colorable seams that allow for a truly seamless blend.
Every strand of Nically Hair is sourced responsibly, with donors fairly compensated. Our extensions are double-drawn for thick, full ends and cuticle-intact for ultimate durability.
Whether you’re working out, styling your hair daily, or looking for something that feels effortless, Nically Hair moves with you and stays looking fresh longer.
Nically Hair was created because no other brand was meeting the needs of both stylists and clients.

I’ve been behind the chair, and now I’m bringing a product that changes the game. If you’ve ever struggled with traditional hand-tied extensions that shed, don’t blend, or don’t last, it’s time to try something different. It’s time to experience Nically Hair’s Active Genius Weft—because it’s just genius. Flawless. Seamless. Made for You.
